creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Hi,

The maintainer's patch is in DOS format. That means there are CRs (0x0d) at
the end of patched lines. It breaks the build process. After removing CRs,
make build runs smoothly.
(Ref: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?prp=128469-2-txt&n=/dovecot.diff)

Best regards,
Sunpoet
